findings.title: Scope does not clearly match the issue body
findings.detail: The issue body asks to check whether prompts required outside of plan/tasks exist. The spec narrows scope to adding two rereview prompt files.
findings.suggested_resolution: Define the exact scope and enumerate the prompt references covered.
findings.notes: Spec now has explicit Scope section reconciling issue body with deliverable. Issue author confirmed scope is prompt addition only (2x). All non-plan/tasks prompt references audited: spec rereview and plan rereview are the only gaps.

findings.title: Template inclusion is internally contradictory
findings.detail: The spec's mandatory requirements said template/, but design decisions said global/ only.

findings.title: rereview の出力契約が既存実装に対して未確定
findings.detail: spec_fix と plan_fix が消費する JSON フィールドが明記されていなかった。
findings.suggested_resolution: 各コマンドが受け取る正確な JSON schema を明記。
findings.notes: Full JSON schema added to spec with field names matching existing fix commands.
